name: Miniature French Breakfast Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Soft shortening/butter mix        1/3 cup Butter, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease the bottoms of 48 small muffin cups.
3. Mix together the shortening, 1/2 cup sugar, and egg thoroughly.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
5. Alternately stir in the flour mixture and milk into the sugar/shortening mixture until just combined.
6. Fill each greased muffin cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Immediately dip each puff in melted butter, then roll in a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
9. Serve hot. Makes 3-1/2 to 4 dozen.
